title: Payment Terms Eval
query: What are the payment terms for eval-payment-terms?
content: Invoices tagged eval-payment-terms are due within 30 days. Enterprise customers may request net-45 terms with finance approval.

title: Support Policy Eval
query: What response target applies to eval-support-policy customers?
content: The eval-support-policy priority support program runs Monday to Friday. Gold plan users receive a first response target of 2 hours.
